---
name: Bug report
about: Something in NLPL is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction

Minimal NLPL source (or Python snippet) that triggers the issue:

```nlpl
# paste code here
```

**Command used:**
```
python src/main.py <file>.nlpl
```

## Expected behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

Paste the full error message or wrong output, including the `[Exxx]` code if present.

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version (`python --version`):
- NLPL commit (`git rev-parse --short HEAD`):
- Flags used (`--debug`, `--no-type-check`, etc.):

## Additional context

Any other information that may help diagnose the issue (e.g., only reproducible with
type-checking enabled, only on certain platforms, regression since a specific commit).
